title: cephaelis umbellata
intro: Cephaelis umbellata, also known as Yellow Root, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and a yellowish-brown root. The medicinal properties of Cephaelis umbellata lie in its berberine content, a compound with antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of using Yellow Root include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, lower blood sugar levels, and support immune function. Cephaelis umbellata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
